title: Vanilla OVERHAULED
description: This is a modpack that will completely overhaul your minecraft experience ,using over 80 client-side : aesthetic mods , performance mods , quality of life mods , resource packs and shaders!!
body:
This is a client-side modpack that will completely overhaul your minecraft experience ,using over 80 client-side : aesthetic mods , performance mods , quality of life mods , resource packs and shaders!!

Aesthetic mods such as explosive enhansments or 3d skin layers change the look of the game ,  quality of life mods like chest searchbar or xaero's minimap make it a your expeirience better , shaders make the game look stuning and resource packs like better animations or fresh animations serve the same purpose as the aesthetic mods , but others such as enchantment icons can also be helpfull .
